name: Nick Di Paolo
bio: Nick Di Paolo is an American stand-up comedian, writer, and podcast host known for blunt, politically incorrect material and a combative everyman persona. He wrote for The Chris Rock Show and was a regular on Comedy Centrals Tough Crowd with Colin Quinn, also appearing on numerous Comedy Central Roasts. He has released several stand-up albums and specials and hosts The Nick Di Paolo Show.

timeline.ev: Performs first stand-up routine in Boston
Releases debut album Born This Way
Becomes a regular on Tough Crowd with Colin Quinn
Launches The Nick Di Paolo Show

accolades: Two-time Emmy nominee for writing on The Chris Rock Show
